headline: Stock Market Today: Dow Rises Ahead Of Fed Inflation Data; Adobe Dives On Earnings News (Live Coverage)

headline: Fortinet FortiOS 8.0 Targets AI Security And Quantum Ready Growth
summary: Fortinet (NasdaqGS:FTNT) introduced FortiOS 8.0 with new AI-driven security capabilities. The company expanded its Security Operations platform with quantum-safe cryptography and sovereign SASE options. The update adds AI-aware application controls, real-time visibility into AI activity, and consolidated endpoint protections. Fortinet, best known for its firewall and broader security platform, is using FortiOS 8.0 to push deeper into SecOps, SASE, and AI security. The company is tying...
